title: Simple Tools
description: Adds new quality-of-life crafting recipes for crafting basic tools in the 2x2 inventory grid.
body:
**What is this for?**
---
This mod/datapack lets you craft basic starter tools directly from your inventory using new simplified recipes. Now you won't need to make a crafting table just for that wooden pickaxe that you're going to throw away after mining 3 stone!

![Gif cycling through the crafting recipes for each tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb30fc00bdc37ecc1eaa80da2d3e56e8447db9b8.gif)

**Extra features**
---
Why throw away that string when you could easily craft a new bow or fishing rod right from your inventory?

![2x2 grid with 2 sticks on the bottom left and top right and a string on the bottom right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7589c889f51902d6c0f8e58f6668a33ff792bb.png)
![2x2 grid with 1 stick on the top left and string in the other 3 slots.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6806438c6c464a7dc34b1e9eeef818651ef44afe.png)

**Want more?**
---
If you like this mod then you might also enjoy [Easy Recipes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/easy-recipes), which adds new and more resource efficient recipes for crafting building resources directly from your inventory.

[![Icon for Easy Recipes, showing two wooden slabs above each other on the left, with a red arrow in the center pointing towards a wooden plank on the right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/311c6d6cd4b3a3286789ac024c602eff543df691.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/easy-recipes)
